mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, u.daily_quota AS dailyQuota, u.used_quota AS usedQuota, u.create_time AS createTime, u.remark FROM ai_user u
AND u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{pageRequest.nickname}, '%')
AND u.remark LIKE CONCAT('%', #{pageRequest.remark}, '%')
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
